description: Paligo is a component content management system (CCMS) for creating, managing, and publishing structured documentation. It is used for technical documentation and other structured content workflows.
summary: Paligo exposes a documented REST API for tenant instances at `https://example.paligoapp.com/api/v2`, authenticated with a Paligo-issued API key sent as a bearer token; I found no separate GraphQL API, MCP server, or CLI.
